title: MolGap | 2M-2D to 1M-3D Fusion Staging
description: Private immutable staging dataset for three bounded Phase 8 fusion controls. Contains aligned FP16 GPS7/GPS9 prefixes for the Exact-2M coverage and Hard20K experts plus SCNet checksums and staging metadata. The 1M SchNet embedding remains in nothingnessvoid/1m-full.
